case_title: Q-ARCHITECTURE, INC. VS. PHILLIPE GUY FOSSIER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,603.75 FILED BY Q-ARCHITECTURE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FOSSIER, PHILLIPE GUY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF Q-ARCHITECTURE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY THEO REVLOCK AND DAWN MA, OWNERS. DEFENDANTS PHILLIPE GUY FOSSIER AND PATTY KONG ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATTY KONG WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
